title: Vy Nguyen Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Vy Nguyen Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Vy Nguyen
Khoury Alumni
MS in Computer Science ’17
Seattle Campus
When Vy Nguyen told her mom she was going to get her master’s in computer science, it seemed like a crazy idea. But years later, after unlocking a new passion in the Align program, she is working on Amazon’s Shop By Interest product and leading community events to uplift women in tech. Her mom still can’t believe the shape of her career path, but they are both happy she took the leap.
We had a very friendly atmosphere where the faculty was really open to talking to us. We all felt like we were in an environment where we could all talk about how confused we are about this class we all took together. I think that’s why I made such good friends
Vy Nguyen, Align MSCS ’17
Explore all Khoury Stories
